mapper.sql:
select ps.reason , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , ps.product_info_product_info_id_1 , pi.product_name , ps.suggest_date , ps.suggest_quantity , pi.shelf_life , pi.unit , pi.min_stock , pi.category , ps.procurement_suggestion_id , pi.barcode , pi.brand
FROM procurement_suggestion ps left join product_info pi on ps.product_info_product_info_id_1 = pi.product_info_id
mapper.select:
select ps.reason , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 , pi.specification , pi.serial_number , ps.product_info_product_info_id_1 , pi.product_name , ps.suggest_date , ps.suggest_quantity , pi.shelf_life , pi.unit , pi.min_stock , pi.category , ps.procurement_suggestion_id , pi.barcode , pi.brand
FROM procurement_suggestion ps left join
product_info
pi on ps.product_info_product_info_id_1 = pi.product_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
